description: Ousmane Kromah exceeding coaches' expectations. Conrad Hussey no longer on football team. We also have some Nole Nuggets. And make sure to follow us on our social accounts, and share this newsletter with a friend.

title: Unpacking scrimmage No. 2, FSU in spotlight on ACC Network
description: Tony White lights a fire. Gus Malzahn on the offense. ACC Network spotlight on FSU. We also have some Nole Nuggets. Make sure to follow us on our social accounts, and share this newsletter with a friend.

title: FSU prepares for scrimmage No. 2, soccer takes exhibition win

title: Offense, defense notebooks from scrimmage No. 1
description: Gus Malzahn and Tony White give their first impressions of the Seminoles after one week and one scrimmage. We also have some Nole Nuggets. But first a thank you to our readers.

title: FSU's OL continuity, Elijah Moore's step forward
description: The Seminoles' line is building continuity in camp. Elijah Moore's comfort at FSU in year 2. An FSU hoops signee. Nole Nuggets. Make sure to follow us on our social accounts, and share this newsletter with a friend.

title: FSU football camp opens

title: FSU's search for efficiency on offense
description: A look at four factors to watch as we track FSU's efficiency on offense in 2025. We also have some Nole Nuggets and make sure to follow us on our social accounts, and share this newsletter with a friend.
